title: ‘Diplomacy Through Architecture’: Architecture Students Take Part in Unique Trip to Japan
summary_en: Every year for the last decade and a half, a prestigious international exchange program has chosen a single class of students to travel to Japan to explore the country’s practices and culture. For the...
title_cn: “以建筑促外交”：美国伊利诺伊理工学院建筑专业学生参与友达倡议赴日交流项目
